reviews.comment:
Buen servicentro. Si sos socio y vas para Bariloche te conviene cargar nafta ahí ya que en la ciudad tenés que esperar una hora. Podés picar algo mientras disfrutas de una linda vista del lago Mascardi

(Translated by Google)
Good service station. If you're a member and you're going to Bariloche, it's best to fill up there since you'll have to wait an hour in the city. You can grab a bite to eat while enjoying a nice view of Lake Mascardi.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bF9EeGp3RRAB
